moderatedChannels.title: Online channels you moderate
moderatedChannels.reconnect: Reconnect Twitch to refresh your moderated channel access.
moderatedChannels.empty: No moderated channels are live right now.

enableBot.title: Enable the bot
enableBot.body: Turn on bot control in Settings before using requests on your channel.

offlineTesting.title: Offline testing is on
offlineTesting.body: Requests stay available while you test the bot offline.

goLive.title: Go live to start taking requests
goLive.body: Requests are meant to run while your channel is live.

requestsPaused.title: Requests are paused
requestsPaused.body: Re-enable requests in Settings when you want viewers to add songs again.

channelReady.title: Channel is ready
channelReady.body: Your stream is live and requests are available.

checkStatus.title: Check channel status
checkStatus.body: Make sure the bot is connected before you start taking requests.

header.title: Settings
header.description: Owner-only channel configuration for requests, moderators, and the stream overlay.
header.betaNote: Beta testers can install the Twitch extension panel on Twitch.

states.saveFailed: Save failed. Review the message below and try again.

ownerOnly.title: Owner settings only
ownerOnly.description: This area is only available for channels you own. Use the channel page for moderation work on channels you manage.
ownerOnly.signInHint: Sign in with a streamer account that owns a channel to manage owner settings here.

channelSetup.title: Channel setup
channelSetup.description: Control the main playlist toggles, chat command, and viewer-facing playlist behavior.
channelSetup.reconnectNotice: Twitch permissions need to be refreshed before the bot can run.
channelSetup.enableBotHelp: Turn this off when you do not want request-bot actions, including awarding VIP tokens for subscriptions, raids, etc.
channelSetup.enableRequestsHelp: Turning requests off keeps playlist management available to you and your moderators, but viewers cannot add songs.
channelSetup.commandPrefixHelp: Use the command viewers type in chat.
channelSetup.requestModifiersHelp: Let chat request bass arrangements with the *bass modifier.
channelSetup.allowBassModifier: Allow the *bass modifier in chat commands
channelSetup.duplicateCooldownHelp: Set how long the same song waits before it can be requested again.

requestAccess.title: Who can request
requestAccess.description: Choose which viewers can add songs to your playlist.

filters.title: Search and request filters
filters.description: These rules limit what appears in search and what viewers can request on your channel page.

officialDlc.title: Official DLC
officialDlc.description: Limit search results and requests to official DLC.
officialDlc.notice: Official DLC filters are not available yet. This section previews settings that appear here in a future update.
officialDlc.onlyOwned: Only include official DLC that I own

allowedTunings.title: Allowed tunings
allowedTunings.description: Click any tuning to allow or block it.

requiredPaths.title: Required paths
requiredPaths.description: Choose the paths a song needs before it appears in search or can be requested.
requiredPaths.none: No path filter is active. Songs can match with any path combination.
requiredPaths.singleSuffix: They can still include any other paths.
requiredPaths.matchAnyPrefix: Songs match if they include at least one of
requiredPaths.matchAnySuffix: They can still include any other paths.
requiredPaths.matchAnyExample: still matches because it includes one selected path.
requiredPaths.matchAllPrefix: Songs match only if they include all of
requiredPaths.matchAllSuffix: They can still include any other paths.
requiredPaths.matchAllExample: still matches because it includes every selected path.

queueLimits.title: Queue and rate limits
queueLimits.description: Set the playlist size and decide how often regular or VIP requests can be added.

vipAutomation.title: VIP token automation
vipAutomation.description: Automatically reward VIP tokens for new subs, gifted subs, raids, cheers, and StreamElements tips.
vipAutomation.newSub: Give 1 VIP token for a new paid sub
vipAutomation.sharedRenewal: Give 1 VIP token for a shared sub renewal message
vipAutomation.sharedRenewalHelp: Quiet sub renewals do not award automatically. Twitch only sends a renewal event here when the viewer shares the resub message in chat.
vipAutomation.subGifter: Give 1 VIP token to the gifter for each gifted sub
vipAutomation.subRecipient: Give 1 VIP token to each gifted sub recipient
vipAutomation.raidReward: Give 1 VIP token to the streamer who raids this channel
vipAutomation.raidNotice: Twitch only sends raid rewards here when the raid shows up in chat.
vipAutomation.minimumCheer: Minimum cheer to earn a partial token
vipAutomation.minimumCheerExample: Minimum cheer: {bits} bits grants {tokenCount} of a VIP token at the {percent}% threshold.
vipAutomation.bitsExample: {oneTokenBits} bits grants 1 VIP token. {fiveTokenBits} bits grants 5 VIP tokens.
vipAutomation.bitsExampleEmpty: Set the bits per VIP token above 0 to preview the minimum cheer threshold.
vipAutomation.tipsToggle: Give VIP tokens for StreamElements tips
vipAutomation.tipAmountHelp: A $25 tip grants 5 VIP tokens when this is set to 5.
vipAutomation.relayUrlHelp: Use this URL in the Streamer.bot step that forwards your StreamElements tip event.
vipAutomation.setupHelp: StreamElements can keep showing tip alerts in OBS the way you already use them. VIP token rewards need Streamer.bot to forward the tip event here.

setupSteps.trigger: Use the StreamElements Tip trigger in Streamer.bot.
setupSteps.send: Send that tip event to the Relay URL shown here.
setupSteps.note: Without Streamer.bot, tips still show in OBS, but they do not add VIP tokens here.

rules.title: Blacklist and setlist rules
rules.description: Blacklist and setlist entries are managed on the channel page. These toggles control how those rules are enforced.

moderatorPermissions.title: Moderator permissions
moderatorPermissions.description: Moderators always see VIP tokens. Turn other channel-management actions on or off here.

overlay.title: Stream overlay
overlay.description: Display your playlist on your stream using a browser source.

states.failedToSave: Overlay settings could not be saved.

theme.title: Theme
theme.backgroundColorHelp: For a transparent background, set background opacity to 0.

sizing.title: Density and sizing
sizing.backgroundOpacityHelp: Set this to 0 for a fully transparent background behind the playlist items.

restoreDialog.title: Restore defaults?
restoreDialog.description: This resets the overlay editor to the default theme. Unsaved changes will be lost.
